creator: yoda@schli.ch
text:
I totally agree with Robert here. I use egrep and fgrep since ages. This warning is annoying. Removing egrep and fgrep would be completely irresponsible. These tools are part of Unix. You cannot simply break backwards compatibility like this after decades for no reason whatsoever.

Please remove the warning, and tell whoever wants to deprecate these tools, that this is a very very bad idea.
